doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains critically false legal claims (tenants do have a right to cure and require a court eviction proceeding under Illinois law), fabricated reference numbers, and an implausible joint HUD/Illinois AG co-issuance format inco
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains critically false legal information (a 5-day pay-or-quit notice does NOT require tenants to vacate without a court eviction proceeding under Illinois law—tenants have a right to cure or contest in court), the formatting and joint-issuance claim are implausible for genuine HUD/Illinois AG documents, and no such reference "TRF-2026-IL" exists in any verifiable HUD publication series.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document contains critically false legal claims (tenants do have a right to cure and require a court eviction proceeding under Illinois law), fabricated reference numbers, and an implausible joint HUD/Illinois AG co-issuance format inconsistent with how either agency publishes tenant guidance.
